name: oh-court-docs
description: Draft and format pleadings, declarations, motions, notices, and proposed orders for Ohio courts. Applies Ohio Civ. R. 10 + per-court local rules statewide formatting; includes Cuyahoga County Court of Common Pleas (Cleveland) and Franklin County Court of Common Pleas (Columbus) specifics plus a county-courts roll-up; supports pro se workflows. Architected as matter-neutral civil-procedure skills (Ohio Civ. R. civil rules, Ohio Evid. R. evidence rules, fees and costs, local rules, citation format per the Ohio Manual of Citations) plus subject-matter bundles. The first subject-matter bundle, oh-consumer-debt, covers FDCPA / Reg F / state UTPA-equivalent / chain-of-title doctrine. All workflows are skills (no slash commands) so the agent invokes them automatically from natural-language requests.
